version_description: This is a version to play the song, it works perfect on the piano as well. You just need to find the vibe and improvise a bit.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Any night, any day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
In the mornin' or the late[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Bona fide stallion[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Ain't in no stable, no, you stay on the run[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Ain't on the side, you're number one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Yeah, every time I come around, you get it done (You get it done)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Fifty-fifty, love the way you split it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Hundred racks, help me spend it, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Light a match, get litty, babe[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
That jet set, watch the sunset kinda, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Rollin' eyes back in my head, make my toes curl, yeah, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Any night, any day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
In the mornin' or the late[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Standin' up, keep me on the rise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Lost control of myself, I'm compromised[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
You're incriminating, no disguise (No disguise)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
And you ain't never runnin' low on supplies[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Fifty-fifty, love the way you split it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Hundred racks, help me spend it, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Light a match, get litty, babe[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
That jet set, watch the sunset kinda, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Rollin' eyes back in my head, make my toes curl, yeah, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Any night, any day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
In the mornin' or the late[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                       [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
Hop in the Lambo', I'm on my way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                           [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Drew House slippers on with a smile on my face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                                   [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
I'm elated that you are my lady[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]               
You got the yum, yum, yum, yum[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/E[/ch]
You got the yum, yum-yum, woah[/tab]

Woah-ooh


[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Am7/E[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]

Yeah babe, yeah babe, yeah babe[/tab]
